name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Niobec Project in North America dated June 2011.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Niobec Project in North America dated June 2011.pdf
document.description: The report assesses the economic feasibility of expanding the Niobec Mine in Québec, Canada from underground to open-pit mining and provides an updated mineral resource estimate.
